response.objective_caption: A table covered with a lavender tablecloth holds a two-liter bottle of Coca-Cola, a standing can of Coca-Cola, several cans of Busch beer, and a checkers board with red playing pieces arranged on it. A small dark bowl sits in the foreground, and kitchen cabinets and a doorway are visible in the background under warm indoor lighting.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A table covered with a lavender tablecloth holds a two-liter bottle of Coca-Cola, a standing can of Coca-Cola, several cans of Busch beer, and a checkers board with red playing pieces, captured with the casual, unplanned energy of amateur vernacular photography. The scene features slightly tilted framing, indifferent composition, and haphazard placement of drinks and objects under warm indoor lighting.
